feed.title: SaaS vendors
feed.subtitle: Combined updates from HashiCorp / HCP (blog + changelog), Bitly (blog + press + MCP changelog), and Common Ninja.

entry.title: HCP Vault Dedicated introduces cluster disaster recovery (public preview)
entry.content: Cluster DR for HCP Vault Dedicated (public preview) enables DR drills at the cluster level, so teams can simulate cluster failures and prove failover readiness.

entry.title: Advancing AI agent security in Vault
entry.content: HashiCorp Vault Enterprise advances AI agent security with recent enhancements now available in public preview.

entry.title: Bitly vs Unitag: Choosing the Right QR Code and Link Management Platform
entry.content: Compare Bitly and Unitag on QR Codes, link management, analytics, and pricing to find the right fit. Start for free with Bitly today.

entry.title: Bitly vs QR Code Chimp: How to Choose the Right QR Code Platform
entry.content: Compare Bitly and QR Code Chimp on QR Code features, pricing, analytics, and security. See which platform fits your marketing workflow. Get started free.

entry.title: The Insights Marketers Are Still Missing: A Conversation With Bitly CMO Tara Robertson
entry.content: Bitly CMO breaks down the marketing visibility gap—why attribution is still broken, how AI is changing measurement, and what to do about it.

entry.title: How I Turned Every Link Into a Branded, Trackable Asset (And You Can Too)
entry.content: Tech content creator Stephen Robles shares how Bitly helped him build a branded link system with custom domains, QR Codes, and analytics.

entry.title: Bitly vs V1CE: Which Digital Business Card Platform Fits Your Workflow?
entry.content: Bitly vs V1CE — compare features, pricing, and analytics to find the right digital business card platform. Get started with Bitly for free.

entry.title: Bitly vs Rb.gy: Which Link Shortener Fits Your Workflow?
entry.content: Compare Bitly and Rb.gy side by side on features, pricing, analytics, branding, and security to find the right link shortener. Get started with Bitly for free.

entry.title: The Marketer’s Guide to Owning Short Links and QR Codes
entry.content: Learn the importance of owning your short links and QR Codes, from redirect control to cleaner analytics, stronger trust, and fewer broken journeys.

entry.title: Which QR Code Metrics Actually Prove Campaign ROI?
entry.content: Use qr code campaign performance metrics to connect scans to conversions, revenue, and budget decisions—no more guesswork.

entry.title: Can Engagement Analytics Connect Offline and Online?
entry.content: See how customer engagement analytics unifies clicks and scans, closes attribution gaps, and gives you one view of intent across channels.

entry.title: What Are Good Link Performance Benchmarks by Channel?
entry.content: Use channel-specific link performance benchmarks to judge clicks, explain results, and make smarter budget and tracking decisions.

entry.title: QR Code Feedback Loops Work Best When Scans Stay Live
entry.content: Static vs. dynamic matters in QR Code feedback loops. Compare attribution, routing, and response workflows before you launch.

entry.title: What Do QR Codes Actually Do in the Customer Lifecycle?
entry.content: QR Codes aren't campaign accessories. See how customer lifecycle marketing with QR Codes turns every scan into a measurable, connected strategy.

entry.title: Introducing tfctl: The CLI for HCP Terraform and TFE
entry.content: tfctl is the first dedicated CLI for HCP Terraform and Terraform Enterprise, giving engineers and AI agents full, safe access to the platform API.

entry.title: What’s new with Terraform + Ansible
entry.content: Learn how the Terraform Ansible Collection 2.0, pyTFE, and an enhanced Terraform actions experience help simplify infrastructure lifecycle management across Terraform and Ansible.

entry.title: Implementing workload identity with HashiCorp Vault and SPIFFE
entry.content: Learn how to use HashiCorp Vault as a SPIFFE identity issuer and broker to streamline workload identity and authorization, while defining exactly where SPIRE fits

entry.title: 2026-06-15: HCP Vault 2.0 for AWS and Azure: Vault 2.0 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters…
entry.content: HCP Vault 2.0 for AWS and Azure: Vault 2.0 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to HCP Vault Dedicated changelog to learn more about Vault 2.0 capabilities available to HCP Vault.

entry.title: Terraform MCP server is now generally available
entry.content: Terraform MCP server 1.0 ensures consistent infrastructure across your organization with flexible deployment options.

entry.title: How to Know Which Marketing Channel Is Actually Driving Conversions
entry.content: Still guessing which platform converts? Sophie of Pretty Little Marketer shares how she uses Bitly to make the customer journey visible.

entry.title: HCP Packer adds enforced provisioners
entry.content: HCP Packer now supports enforced provisioners, enabling platform and security teams to centrally apply mandatory provisioning steps across image builds.

entry.title: With great AI power comes the need for zero trust responsibility
entry.content: Learn how to mitigate autonomous AI exploits like Claude Mythos using IBM Vault Radar for preemptive hygiene and IBM Vault for dynamic runtime security.

entry.title: How to Add an AI Chatbot to Your Website: 4 Methods Compared
entry.content:
A practical guide to adding an AI chatbot to any website. Four methods compared, plus a no-code, step-by-step widget walkthrough that trains on your own content, the embed code, and platform notes for Squarespace, Shopify, Webflow, WordPress, and Wix.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: Rethinking infrastructure access in the age of agentic AI
entry.content: HashiCorp Boundary enables secure agentic AI at scale with unique identities, JIT credentials, explicit delegation, point-of-use enforcement, and auditable control.

entry.title: How to Embed Google Reviews on Your Website: 4 Methods Compared
entry.content:
A practical guide to embedding Google reviews on any website. Four methods compared, plus a no-code, step-by-step widget walkthrough, the embed code, and platform notes for WordPress, Shopify, Wix, Squarespace, and Webflow.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: HCP Terraform adds project-level run tasks
entry.content: HCP Terraform now supports project-level run tasks, enabling organizations to apply security, compliance, and operational guardrails consistently across groups of workspaces while reducing manual overhead.

entry.title: How to Embed an Instagram Feed on Your Website: 4 Free Methods
entry.content:
A practical guide to embedding an Instagram feed on any website. Four free methods compared, plus a no-code, step-by-step walkthrough and the HTML you need.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: Added a tool to retrieve a group's preferences, including its default domain for link creation.
entry.content: Added a tool to retrieve a group's preferences, including its default domain for link creation.

entry.title: The Best AI Prompts for Link and QR Code Management: 40+ Ideas to Get Started
entry.content: Copy and paste 40+ ready-to-use AI prompts for link and QR Code management. Create short links, track campaigns, and uncover insights now.

entry.title: SCIM in HashiCorp Vault standardizes provisioning in platforms
entry.content: HashiCorp Vault 2.0 adds beta SCIM support, letting organizations standardize user and group provisioning from external identity platforms into Vault.

entry.title: Consul 2.0 improves flexibility, control, and scalability
entry.content: Consul 2.0 enhancements include multi-port for service mesh, CyberArk Workload Identity Manager, cluster rate limiting, and auto-scaling for API gateway.

entry.title: Encrypting large artifacts and streaming workloads with Vault
entry.content: Use Vault Transit with envelope encryption to securely protect large artifacts and streaming workloads without sending payloads to Vault.

entry.title: Azure hub-and-spoke generally available for HCP Vault Dedicated
entry.content: Azure hub-and-spoke networking is now generally available in HCP Vault Dedicated, supporting enhanced cloud security maturity with private connectivity.

entry.title: The great AI divide: Why early leaders embrace an AI operating model
entry.content: The enterprises pulling ahead aren't experimenting with AI — they're operationalizing it. Here's what separates the leaders from the rest.

entry.title: New in Terraform 1.15: Dynamic sources, variable deprecation, and more
entry.content: Terraform 1.15 adds Windows ARM64 builds, variable deprecation, S3 AWS login, inline type conversion, and dynamic module sources.

entry.title: Terraform Enterprise 2.0: Evolving infrastructure operations for scale
entry.content: Terraform Enterprise 2.0 helps organizations scale infrastructure operations, strengthen governance, and reduce operational complexity.

entry.title: Announcing native AI agent support in HashiCorp Vault
entry.content: HashiCorp Vault now enables enterprises to manage agentic IAM including trusted identities, delegated authorization, fine-grained controls and end-to-end tracing.

entry.title: IBM Vault 2.0 adds UI enhancements and improved reporting visibility
entry.content: IBM Vault 2.0 introduces UI enhancements, including in-product guidance to surface value faster, plus enhanced reporting for greater transparency and visibility.

entry.title: Terraform adds cost visibility, project-level notifications, and more
entry.content: HCP Terraform and Terraform Enterprise continue to reduce operational overhead and strengthen governance and security across the entire infrastructure lifecycle.

entry.title: On-Page SEO Checklist: How to Optimize Every Page
entry.content:
A 15-step on-page SEO checklist you can apply to every page on your site, with free tools to check each one.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: 2026-04-09: HCP Organizations: A self-service organization deletion checklist is now available for organization…
entry.content: HCP Organizations: A self-service organization deletion checklist is now available for organization owners. The checklist provides an automated pre-flight check to verify that all prerequisites—such as decommissioning active resources, resolving billing requirements, and clearing IAM configurations—are met before an organization can be deleted. This reduces the need for manual support tickets and provides a more seamless, transparent experience. For more information, refer to the Organizations documentation.

entry.title: Bitly Introduces AI-Powered Features to Simplify and Accelerate Marketing Analytics
entry.content: Bitly Introduces AI-Powered Features to Simplify and Accelerate Marketing Analytics

entry.title: Clarified device tool descriptions to distinguish device operating system from device form factor.
entry.content: Clarified device tool descriptions to distinguish device operating system from device form factor.

entry.title: Design Your Website Without a Designer: Free Tools and Tips
entry.content:
You don't need a design degree or an expensive agency. These free tools and principles will help you create a professional-looking website on your own.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: SaaS Metrics That Matter: The Founder's Monthly Dashboard
entry.content:
Investors and board members ask about MRR. But the metrics that actually save your company are burn rate, CAC, churn, and LTV. Here's the dashboard you need.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: Bitly Appoints Matt Young as CTO, Strengthening Leadership Team Under CEO Peter Krivkovich
entry.content: Bitly Appoints Matt Young as CTO, Strengthening Leadership Team Under CEO Peter Krivkovich

entry.title: Social Media ROI: How to Track Every Click Back to Revenue
entry.content:
Social media feels productive, but is it profitable? Here's how to connect every post, story, and ad to actual revenue using UTM tracking and attribution.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: How to Measure and Improve Website Engagement Beyond Pageviews
entry.content:
Pageviews tell you who showed up. Engagement metrics tell you who cared. Here's how to measure what actually matters.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: How to Get More Reviews Without Begging: A Repeatable System
entry.content:
The businesses with the most reviews aren't the ones who ask the loudest. They're the ones with a system. Here's how to build yours.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: Added a tool to create a short link and a QR Code in a single step.
entry.content: Added a tool to create a short link and a QR Code in a single step.

entry.title: 2026-02-26: HCP Vault 1.21.3 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.21.3 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clus…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.21.3 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.21.3 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.21.3 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.21.3.

entry.title: NPS vs CSAT: Which Customer Metric Should You Actually Track?
entry.content:
NPS measures loyalty. CSAT measures satisfaction. You probably need both, but for different reasons. Here's how to choose.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: How to Run a Webinar That Generates Leads, Not Just Attendees
entry.content:
Webinars fill pipelines when they're designed for lead generation, not just education. Here's how to turn attendees into qualified leads.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: Email List Building: 12 Tactics That Still Work in 2026
entry.content:
Email lists are the only marketing asset you truly own. These 12 tactics will help you grow yours without buying contacts or spamming people.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: How to Build a Landing Page That Actually Converts
entry.content:
Most landing pages fail because they try to do too much. This step-by-step guide shows you how to build one focused page that converts.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: Bitly Enters 2026 as the Embedded Connection Layer Powering Links and QR Codes Worldwide
entry.content: Bitly Enters 2026 as the Embedded Connection Layer Powering Links and QR Codes Worldwide

entry.title: Exit Popups That Convert: Recover Visitors Without Being Annoying
entry.content:
Exit popups can recover 10-15% of leaving visitors when done right. Here's how to design them so they convert instead of annoy.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: Added tools for time-series and summary engagement metrics on a single link.
entry.content: Added tools for time-series and summary engagement metrics on a single link.

entry.title: The Complete Guide to Reducing Your Cost Per Lead
entry.content:
High CPL eats your marketing budget. This guide shows you exactly where your lead costs are inflated and how to bring them down systematically.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: 2026-01-27: HCP Vault 1.21.2 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.21.2 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clus…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.21.2 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.21.2 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.21.2 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.21.2.

entry.title: How to Price Products for Profit: A Data-Driven Guide
entry.content:
Pricing is the fastest lever for profit growth. This guide shows you how to set prices using margin data, competitor analysis, and discount modeling.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: 7 E-Commerce Metrics Every Online Store Should Track Weekly
entry.content:
These 7 e-commerce metrics tell you exactly where your store is leaking revenue. Track them weekly to catch problems before they compound.
By Sergei Davidov

entry.title: Added tools to bulk-create short links and QR Codes from a .CSV or .XLSX file. Updated short link creation ...
entry.content: Added tools to bulk-create short links and QR Codes from a .CSV or .XLSX file. Updated short link creation to support custom back-halves on new and existing links.

entry.title: 2025-12-18: HCP Access Management: Project-level service principals can now be assigned organization-level role…
entry.content:
HCP Access Management: Project-level service principals can now be assigned organization-level roles, such as Project Creator or Group Admin. This allows a single principal authenticated with workload identity federation (WIF) to securely automate organization-wide tasks without needing static, org-level keys. For more details, refer to the service principals documentation.

Key Update:

  • You can now grant organization-level permissions to project-level service principals, simplifying secure and large-scale automation.

entry.title: 2025-12-16: HCP Vault 1.21.1 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.21.1 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clus…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.21.1 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.21.1 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.21.1 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.21.1.

entry.title: 2025-12-04: HCP Vault 1.20.6 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.20.6 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clus…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.20.6 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.20.6 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.20.6 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.20.6.

entry.title: Added OAuth 2.1 with Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) for secure authentication. All MCP endpoints now req...
entry.content: Added OAuth 2.1 with Dynamic Client Registration (DCR) for secure authentication. All MCP endpoints now require authentication. Added QR Code appearance customization (foreground/background colors, gradients, frame, pips) to QR Code creation and update.

entry.title: 2025-11-27: HCP organizations now support the assignment of the Owner role to multiple users.
entry.content:
HCP organizations now support the assignment of the Owner role to multiple users. This enhancement creates a more resilient administrative model, eliminating the business continuity risks and operational bottlenecks associated with single-principal ownership. For more information, refer to the access management documentation.

Key Update:

  • Multi-Owner Support: Owners can now delegate the Owner role to additional users, ensuring redundancy if another owner is unavailable.

entry.title: 2025-11-12: HCP Consul dedicated reached its End-of-Life (EOL) on November 12, 2025, and is no longer available.
entry.content: HCP Consul dedicated reached its End-of-Life (EOL) on November 12, 2025, and is no longer available. All active clusters and associated project data were decommissioned in accordance with our EOL policy. For questions about your account and data, or for help migrating to a self-managed Consul deployment, contact our support team.

entry.title: 2025-10-03: HCP Vault 1.20.3 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.20.3 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clus…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.20.3 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.20.3 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.20.3 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.20.3.

entry.title: Added six QR Code scan metrics tools for analyzing QR Code performance.
entry.content: Added six QR Code scan metrics tools for analyzing QR Code performance.

entry.title: 2025-10-01: HCP Europe now available : With HCP Europe, your resources are hosted, managed, and billed separate…
entry.content: HCP Europe now available: With HCP Europe, your resources are hosted, managed, and billed separately to meet European data residency requirements. For more information, refer to HCP Europe.

entry.title: Initial release of the Bitly MCP Server with core link management, analytics, and QR Code tools.
entry.content: Initial release of the Bitly MCP Server with core link management, analytics, and QR Code tools.

entry.title: 2025-06-30: HCP Vault 1.19.5 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.19.5 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clus…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.19.5 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.19.5 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.19.5 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.19.5.

entry.title: 2025-06-10: HCP Vault 1.18.10 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.18.10 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated cl…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.18.10 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.18.10 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.18.10 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.18.10.

entry.title: 2025-05-28: HCP Vault 1.18.9 on AWS: Vault 1.18.9 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AW…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.18.9 on AWS: Vault 1.18.9 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS. Refer to 1.18.9 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.18.9.

entry.title: 2025-04-29: HCP Boundary: HCP Boundary custom auth token Time to Live can be configured by the administrator.
entry.content: HCP Boundary: HCP Boundary custom auth token Time to Live can be configured by the administrator.

entry.title: 2025-04-23: HCP Vault Dedicated: Deleted Clusters on Azure can now be restored for up to 30 days after deletion…
entry.content:
HCP Vault Dedicated: Deleted Clusters on Azure can now be restored for up to 30 days after deletion via support ticket.

HCP Vault Dedicated: HCP Identity-Based Proxy cluster access is now available for Azure clusters.

entry.title: 2025-03-13: HCP Vault 1.18.4 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.18.4 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clus…
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.18.4 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.18.4 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.18.4 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.18.4.

entry.title: 2025-02-18: HCP Audit Log: HCP Audit log streaming is now generally available.
entry.content: HCP Audit Log: HCP Audit log streaming is now generally available.

entry.title: 2025-01-30: HCP Audit Log: Audit logs are now available to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters for Add Plugin, Delete…
entry.content: HCP Audit Log: Audit logs are now available to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters for Add Plugin, Delete Plugin, Is Plugin Registered, Lock, Unlock, Update Version and Restore Snapshot events.

entry.title: 2024-12-11: HCP Audit Log: Audit logs are now available to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters for Create Cluster, Del…
entry.content: HCP Audit Log: Audit logs are now available to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters for Create Cluster, Delete Cluster, Fetch Audit Log, Host Manager Alive and Create Snapshot events.

entry.title: 2024-11-26: HCP Audit Log: Admin token generation audit logs are now available to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters.
entry.content: HCP Audit Log: Admin token generation audit logs are now available to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters.

entry.title: 2024-11-25: HCP Vault Secrets: New sync integration support for GitLab is now available.
entry.content: HCP Vault Secrets: New sync integration support for GitLab is now available.

entry.title: Bitly Launches New ‘Text-to-Pay’ and ‘Text-to-Buy’ Partner Category in App Marketplace
entry.content: Bitly Launches New ‘Text-to-Pay’ and ‘Text-to-Buy’ Partner Category in App Marketplace

entry.title: 2024-11-11: HCP Vault 1.18.1 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.18.1 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clus…
entry.content:
HCP Vault 1.18.1 on AWS and Azure: Vault 1.18.1 has started rolling out to HCP Vault Dedicated clusters on AWS and Azure. Refer to 1.18.1 Enterprise release notes in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.18.1.

Note

Workload identity federation (WIF) for HCP Vault Dedicated cluster's auth methods and secrets engines is not currently supported.

entry.title: 2024-10-24: HCP Access Management: The default soft limit that controls the concurrent number of projects withi…
entry.content: HCP Access Management: The default soft limit that controls the concurrent number of projects within an HCP organization has now been raised to 100. This enables more unique use cases to be managed within an HCP organization and scale with an organization's needs. Refer to service quotas for more details.

entry.title: 2024-10-15: Vault Radar Public Beta: Vault Radar is currently available to be tested by any HCP user.
entry.content:
Vault Radar Public Beta: Vault Radar is currently available to be tested by any HCP user. If you would like to get started, go to your HCP project and claim your Radar instance. Refer to Vault Radar product tiers to learn more.

HCP Vault 1.15.15 on AWS: Vault 1.15.15 is now available on HCP for AWS clusters. Refer to 1.15.15 Enterprise in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.15.15.

HCP Vault Secrets: Dynamic secrets for AWS and GCP are now available in public beta.

entry.title: 2024-10-14: HCP Audit Log Streaming : A public beta of HCP's unified audit log streaming capabilities is now av…
entry.content: HCP Audit Log Streaming: A public beta of HCP's unified audit log streaming capabilities is now available. You can use a web-based UI workflow to send audit logs for your organization's platform and product events to one of the supported external SIEMs: AWS Cloudwatch, Datadog, or Splunk Cloud. For more information, refer to HCP audit log streaming.

entry.title: Bitly Announces Partnership with Global Internet Forum to Counter Terrorism
entry.content: Bitly Announces Partnership with Global Internet Forum to Counter Terrorism

entry.title: 2024-10-05: HCP Access Management: Project-level service principals can now be assigned access to multiple proj…
entry.content: HCP Access Management: Project-level service principals can now be assigned access to multiple projects. This enables workflows that need to interact with more than one project at a time with varying levels of permissions. Refer to documentation for more details.

entry.title: 2024-10-02: HCP Vault 1.15.15 on AWS: Vault 1.15.15 is now available on HCP for AWS clusters.
entry.content:
HCP Vault 1.15.15 on AWS: Vault 1.15.15 is now available on HCP for AWS clusters. Refer to 1.15.15 Enterprise in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.15.15.

HCP Vault 1.16.10 on Azure: Vault 1.16.0 is now available on HCP for Azure clusters. Refer to 1.16.10 Enterprise in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.16.10.

entry.title: 2024-09-09: HCP Vault 1.16.9 on Azure: Vault 1.16.9 is now available on HCP for Azure clusters.
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.16.9 on Azure: Vault 1.16.9 is now available on HCP for Azure clusters. Refer to 1.16.9 Enterprise in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.16.9.

entry.title: 2024-09-06: HCP Vault Dedicated: Clusters can now be configured with a backup network (HVN) for cross-region di…
entry.content: HCP Vault Dedicated: Clusters can now be configured with a backup network (HVN) for cross-region disaster recovery protection. Refer to this guide to configure.

entry.title: Unboxing the Future: How Connected Packaging Strengthens Brand Consistency
entry.content: Unboxing the Future: How Connected Packaging Strengthens Brand Consistency

entry.title: 2024-08-08: HCP Vault Secrets New Sync integration & improvements GitHub Sync Improvements - Multi Account supp…
entry.content:
HCP Vault Secrets New Sync integration & improvements

  • GitHub Sync Improvements - Multi Account support
  • HCP Terraform Sync

entry.title: 2024-07-24: HCP Packer now tracks rich CI/CD pipeline metadata.
entry.content:
HCP Packer now tracks rich CI/CD pipeline metadata. Refer to the following topics for additional information:

  • Rich CI/CD pipeline metadata
  • Build pipeline metadata reference

entry.title: The Top 50 Women Chief Diversity Officers of 2024
entry.content: The Top 50 Women Chief Diversity Officers of 2024

entry.title: Bitly Announces Leadership Team Expansion Fueling Innovation And Business Growth
entry.content: Bitly Announces Leadership Team Expansion Fueling Innovation And Business Growth

entry.title: Bitly Enters Estimated $1.9 Billion Landing Page Market with New Pages Product Launch
entry.content: Bitly Enters Estimated $1.9 Billion Landing Page Market with New Pages Product Launch

entry.title: 2024-05-14: HCP Vault 1.15.8 on AWS: Vault 1.15.8 is now available on HCP for AWS clusters.
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.15.8 on AWS: Vault 1.15.8 is now available on HCP for AWS clusters. Refer to 1.15.8 Enterprise in GitHub to learn more about what's new in 1.15.8.

entry.title: 2024-05-13: HCP Vault Secrets : Enhanced RBAC support with two new roles App Manager and App Secrets Reader via…
entry.content: HCP Vault Secrets: Enhanced RBAC support with two new roles App Manager and App Secrets Reader via UI at the Project level. Additionally, support for these roles to be applied at the App level via Terraform Provider.

entry.title: 2024-05-09: HCP Vault 1.16.2 on Azure: Vault 1.16.2 is now available on HCP for Azure clusters only.
entry.content:
HCP Vault 1.16.2 on Azure: Vault 1.16.2 is now available on HCP for Azure clusters only. Click here to learn more about what's new in 1.16.2.

Notes: The Secrets Sync feature which went GA in Vault 1.16 will remain disabled on HCP Azure clusters while we work on integrating it with the platform itself. Additionally, the Secrets Sync beta which was available in Vault 1.15 won't be available anymore after the upgrade to 1.16, which is why we're holding off on releasing 1.16 to AWS clusters until the integration work is completed.

entry.title: 2024-05-01: HCP Boundary 0.16.0: Boundary 0.16.0 is now available on HCP.
entry.content:
HCP Boundary 0.16.0: Boundary 0.16.0 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 0.16.0.

HCP unified audit log streaming: HCP's unified audit log streaming capabilities are now available as a public beta offering. You can use a new Terraform provider resource to send audit logs for platform and product events to one of the following external SIEMs: AWS Cloudwatch, Datadog, Splunk Cloud. For more information, refer to HCP audit log streaming.

entry.title: 2024-04-25: HCP Vault Secrets : Sync integration support for Azure Key Vault and GCP Secret Manager are now gen…
entry.content: HCP Vault Secrets: Sync integration support for Azure Key Vault and GCP Secret Manager are now generally available on HCP Vault Secrets.

entry.title: From Eco-Conscious to Actionable: How Brands are Embracing QR Codes for Sustainability
entry.content: From Eco-Conscious to Actionable: How Brands are Embracing QR Codes for Sustainability

entry.title: 2024-04-15: HCP Boundary 0.15.4: Boundary 0.15.4 is now available on HCP.
entry.content:
HCP Boundary 0.15.4: Boundary 0.15.4 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 0.15.4.

In addition, HCP Boundary now supports the ability to manually upgrade clusters within a 30 day grace period of a new Boundary release. This can be set in the cluster configuration in the HCP Portal. After 30 days the upgrade will be performed automatically.

entry.title: 2024-03-21: Vault Radar Limited Availability: Vault Radar is currently available to a small set of interested c…
entry.content: Vault Radar Limited Availability: Vault Radar is currently available to a small set of interested customers. If you would like to be an early adopter, you must join this waitlist.

entry.title: 2024-02-06: HCP Vault 1.15.5: Vault 1.15.5 is now available on HCP.
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.15.5: Vault 1.15.5 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 1.15.5.

entry.title: 2024-01-30: HCP Packer New Nomenclature: Renaming of Image Buckets to Bucket: The prefix 'Image' has been remov…
entry.content:
HCP Packer New Nomenclature:

  • Renaming of Image Buckets to Bucket:
    • The prefix 'Image' has been removed from all the resources. This change simplifies the naming convention and makes it more intuitive for users to identify and manage their resources.
  • Renaming of Iteration Resource to Version:
    • The 'Iteration' resource has been renamed to 'Version'. This change better reflects the functionality of the resource and aligns with standard terminology used in version control and software development practices.
  • Renaming of Image Resource to Artifact:
    • The 'Image' resource has been renamed to 'Artifact'. This renaming is part of our ongoing efforts to enhance clarity and consistency in our resource naming. 'Artifact' more accurately represents the nature and usage of these resources in the multi-cloud environment.

Notes: These changes are part of our commitment to improving user experience and aligning with industry standards. Version [0.82.0] of the HCP provider for Terraform reflects these changes. For any questions or concerns, please reach out to our support team.

entry.title: 2024-01-18: Vault Radar Private Beta: Vault Radar is in private beta.
entry.content: Vault Radar Private Beta: Vault Radar is in private beta. Currently, users must accept the terms of use to participate in the beta program.

entry.title: 2024-01-16: IP Allow list is available with HCP Vault .
entry.content: IP Allow list is available with HCP Vault. It allows you to add specific IP addresses or CIDR ranges that will be permitted to access the HCP Vault cluster's public endpoint (if public access is enabled).

entry.title: 2023-12-08: HCP Vault 1.15.4: Vault 1.15.4 is now available on HCP.
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.15.4: Vault 1.15.4 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 1.15.4.

entry.title: 2023-11-28: HCP Vault 1.15.2: Vault 1.15.2 is now available on HCP.
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.15.2: Vault 1.15.2 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 1.15.2.

entry.title: 2023-11-06: HCP Vault expands observability support: HCP Vault gains 3 new observability integrations with AWS…
entry.content: HCP Vault expands observability support: HCP Vault gains 3 new observability integrations with AWS Cloudwatch, Elasticsearch, and New Relic, as well as a generic HTTP endpoint for flexible audit log and metrics streaming.

entry.title: 2023-11-02: HCP Trial Billing Notifications: The organization owner and admin users of any HCP account in Trial…
entry.content: HCP Trial Billing Notifications: The organization owner and admin users of any HCP account in Trial status (i.e. no credit card added) will receive email notifications when their trial credits are running low ($10 or less) or depleted completely.

entry.title: 2023-10-26: Multiple performance replication secondaries for HCP Vault: HCP Vault now supports multiple perform…
entry.content: Multiple performance replication secondaries for HCP Vault: HCP Vault now supports multiple performance replication secondaries on Plus tier.

entry.title: 2023-10-11: HCP Vault Secrets GA: HCP Vault Secrets is now available on HashiCorp Cloud Platform in general ava…
entry.content: HCP Vault Secrets GA: HCP Vault Secrets is now available on HashiCorp Cloud Platform in general availability.

entry.title: 2023-09-21: HCP Vault 1.14.3: Vault 1.14.3 is now available on HCP.
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.14.3: Vault 1.14.3 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 1.14.3.

entry.title: 2023-09-01: HCP Groups: Introducing HCP Groups that allow the bundling of identities and treating them as one u…
entry.content: HCP Groups: Introducing HCP Groups that allow the bundling of identities and treating them as one unit while assigning roles and associating with projects. This enables logical user management and clear auditing of permissions. See the documentation and other information on how to get started.

entry.title: 2023-08-10: HCP Vault 1.14.1: Vault 1.14.1 is now available on HCP.
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.14.1: Vault 1.14.1 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 1.14.1.

entry.title: 2023-07-27: HCP Packer Audit Logs: HCP Packer now supports audit logs streaming to Datadog and Amazon CloudWatc…
entry.content: HCP Packer Audit Logs: HCP Packer now supports audit logs streaming to Datadog and Amazon CloudWatch. Click here to learn more.

entry.title: 2023-07-25: HCP Vault 1.14.0: Vault 1.14.0 is now available on HCP.
entry.content: HCP Vault 1.14.0: Vault 1.14.0 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 1.14.0.

entry.title: 2023-07-17: ADP on HCP Vault Plus Clusters : Advanced Data Protection (ADP) is now available on HCP Vault Plus…
entry.content: ADP on HCP Vault Plus Clusters: Advanced Data Protection (ADP) is now available on HCP Vault Plus clusters at no additional cost. Customers can now use the KMIP, Key Management, and Transform secrets engines that make up the ADP package.

entry.title: 2023-06-13: HCP Vault Secrets Public Beta: HCP Vault Secrets is now available on HashiCorp Cloud Platform in pu…
entry.content: HCP Vault Secrets Public Beta: HCP Vault Secrets is now available on HashiCorp Cloud Platform in public beta.

entry.title: 2023-05-15: HCP Multi-project Support: HCP now supports multiple Projects within an HCP Organization.
entry.content: HCP Multi-project Support: HCP now supports multiple Projects within an HCP Organization. Projects allow HCP admins to logically segment out their HashiCorp services within an Organization by team, environment, or use case with Project-level RBAC policies to ensure least-privilege access. All new and existing Orgs have a default project created.

entry.title: 2023-05-01: HCP Vault Oracle Plugin Support: The Oracle Database Secrets Engine is now supported in HCP Vault o…
entry.content: HCP Vault Oracle Plugin Support: The Oracle Database Secrets Engine is now supported in HCP Vault on AWS.

entry.title: 2023-04-25: HCP Vault Azure Plus Tier General Availability: Plus tier is now generally available on Azure in HC…
entry.content: HCP Vault Azure Plus Tier General Availability: Plus tier is now generally available on Azure in HCP Vault. Plus tier supports performance replication and Sentinel policies, in addition to all existing Standard tier functionality available for HCP Vault on Azure

entry.title: 2023-03-08: HCP Packer channel assignment history and rollback : View the history of channel assignment activit…
entry.content: HCP Packer channel assignment history and rollback: View the history of channel assignment activity and automatically roll back to the previously assigned iteration when revoking a currently published image.

entry.title: 2023-03-06: HCP Consul IP Allow list: This feature improves the security of your HCP Consul deployment by allow…
entry.content: HCP Consul IP Allow list: This feature improves the security of your HCP Consul deployment by allowing access to Consul server, UI, and API only from allowlisted IP CIDRs.

entry.title: 2023-03-02: HCP Consul Management Plane Service General Availability: This service is now generally available.
entry.content: HCP Consul Management Plane Service General Availability: This service is now generally available. With this service, users can get global visibility and control on both their self-managed and HashiCorp-managed Consul clusters.

entry.title: 2023-02-28: HCP Vault General Availability on Azure: HCP Vault is now generally available on Azure.
entry.content:
HCP Vault General Availability on Azure: HCP Vault is now generally available on Azure. HCP Vault gives you the power and security of HashiCorp Vault as a managed service. Read more

Additional Azure Regions: HashiCorp Cloud Platform users can deploy HCP Consul and HCP Vault in four new Azure regions - Canada Central (canadacentral), South East Asia (southeastasia) ; Japan East (japaneast) ; Australia SouthEast (australiasoutheast)

entry.title: 2023-02-08: HashiCorp Cloud Platform users can deploy HCP Consul and HCP Vault in three new AWS regions - Tokyo…
entry.content: HashiCorp Cloud Platform users can deploy HCP Consul and HCP Vault in three new AWS regions - Tokyo, Japan (ap-northeast-1) ; Montreal, Canada (ca-central-1) ; Ohio, US (us-east-2)

entry.title: 2023-02-06: Sentinel on HCP Vault Plus Clusters : Sentinel is now avaliable on HCP Vault Plus clusters at no ad…
entry.content: Sentinel on HCP Vault Plus Clusters: Sentinel is now avaliable on HCP Vault Plus clusters at no additional cost.

entry.title: 2023-01-11: HCP Consul Management Plane Service Public Beta : This service is now available publicly.
entry.content: HCP Consul Management Plane Service Public Beta: This service is now available publicly. With this service, users can get global visibility and control on both their self managed and Hashicorp managed Consul clusters.

entry.title: 2022-12-15: Login with HCP to Vagrant Cloud : Users can now link their HCP accounts to log into Vagrant Cloud ,…
entry.content: Login with HCP to Vagrant Cloud: Users can now link their HCP accounts to log into Vagrant Cloud, or create new accounts using HCP. For more details on this and our HCP strategy for Vagrant, click here.

entry.title: 2022-12-05: HCP Guided Flow for Peering Connections: Users can use a wizard to guide them through the multiple…
entry.content: HCP Guided Flow for Peering Connections: Users can use a wizard to guide them through the multiple steps to peer their AWS VPC to the HashiCorp Virtual Network.

entry.title: 2022-10-25: HCP Packer Ancestry: Users can now track image ancestry in HCP Packer to trace changes and vulnerab…
entry.content: HCP Packer Ancestry: Users can now track image ancestry in HCP Packer to trace changes and vulnerabilities from a source image to all of its descendant images, as well as revoke all descendants through inherited revocation.

entry.title: 2022-09-27: HCP Consul 1.13.2: Consul 1.13.2 is now available on HCP.
entry.content: HCP Consul 1.13.2: Consul 1.13.2 is now available on HCP. Click here to learn more about what's new in 1.13.2. Click here to read the full 1.13.0 changelog.

entry.title: 2022-09-09: Single step automated peering of HVNs to AWS VPCs: Users can click a single button to peer HashiCor…
entry.content: Single step automated peering of HVNs to AWS VPCs: Users can click a single button to peer HashiCorp Virtual Network to their AWS VPCs.

entry.title: 2022-08-29: Automated peering of HashiCorp Virtual Networks to AWS VPCs: Users can leverage automation to peer…
entry.content: Automated peering of HashiCorp Virtual Networks to AWS VPCs: Users can leverage automation to peer HashiCorp Virtual Network to their AWS VPCs, which provides an alternative to manual peering, and reduces the peering time from 30-60 minutes to about 5 minutes.

entry.title: 2022-08-11: Platform Logs (HCP Consul): Platform Logs are auditable events across HCP.
entry.content: Platform Logs (HCP Consul): Platform Logs are auditable events across HCP. This will enable better tracking of changes within a customer's HCP Organization and meet troubleshooting and compliance needs. This release covers HCP Consul and tracks activity like cluster creation, upgrades and snapshots. These logs can be seen when navigating to a particular Consul cluster within the HCP Portal.

entry.title: 2022-07-26: HCP Consul General Availability on Azure: HCP Consul is now generally available on Azure.
entry.content: HCP Consul General Availability on Azure: HCP Consul is now generally available on Azure. HCP Consul is a fully managed service mesh to discover and securely connect any service. Read more

entry.title: 2022-06-30: HCP Packer no longer redacts the image identifier for revoked iterations: The image identifier imag…
entry.content:
HCP Packer no longer redacts the image identifier for revoked iterations: The image identifier image_id will no longer be replaced with error_revoked for revoked iterations. Packer will continue to error when building new images from iterations that are revoked. Terraform will not error but users can validate iterations in their Terraform configurations to prevent new deployments of images from revoked iterations. Read more about validating iterations in Terraform

Note: This is a breaking change for Terraform Configurations that depends on error_revoked to validate iterations.

entry.title: 2022-06-07: HCP Consul on Azure Public Beta: Consul on Azure is now available on HashiCorp Cloud Platform in pu…
entry.content: HCP Consul on Azure Public Beta: Consul on Azure is now available on HashiCorp Cloud Platform in public beta. Read more

entry.title: 2022-05-05: HashiCorp Status site redesign: The HashiCorp Status site, https://status.hashicorp.com , has been…
entry.content: HashiCorp Status site redesign: The HashiCorp Status site, https://status.hashicorp.com, has been redesigned to better meet the needs of the various customers relying on our services. We have streamlined the layout to make it easier to find services and understand how an incident is impacting them. Historical information is still preserved for customers interested in past incidents.

entry.title: 2022-04-06: HCP Terraform Provider 0.25.0: Version 0.25.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available.
entry.content:
HCP Terraform Provider 0.25.0: Version 0.25.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available. Read more

  • What's New:
    • Users can now scale plus-tier clusters and use path filtering

entry.title: 2022-03-29: HCP Vault Plus Paths Filters and Cluster Resizing: Users can now create deny paths filters for perf…
entry.content: HCP Vault Plus Paths Filters and Cluster Resizing: Users can now create deny paths filters for performance replicas. Users can also resize their Plus clusters and secondaries in-place.

entry.title: 2022-02-22: HCP Consul Audit Log Download: Users can now download audit logs from all HCP Consul cluster tiers…
entry.content:
HCP Consul Audit Log Download: Users can now download audit logs from all HCP Consul cluster tiers except “Development”. Read more

HCP Vault Plus Configuration: Users can create a new HCP Vault configuration: The Plus tier includes all of the functionality in the Standard tier and adds the ability to create multi-region performance replicas. The Plus tier has three size offerings (S, M, L), and unlimited clients. Read replicas will include: secrets, policies, secrets backend config, auth backends config, audit backends config, and batch tokens. Read more

entry.title: 2021-12-16: Remove Credit Card: Users can now remove their credit card on the HCP portal billing page.
entry.content: Remove Credit Card: Users can now remove their credit card on the HCP portal billing page. The account must be in good standing and cannot run production-tier resources without a payment method.

entry.title: 2021-12-08: HCP Vault Cluster Scaling Now Available: HCP Vault clusters can now be modified in-place based on t…
entry.content: HCP Vault Cluster Scaling Now Available: HCP Vault clusters can now be modified in-place based on tier (Dev, Starter, Standard) or size (Standard S, M, L).

entry.title: 2021-10-14: HCP Vault and HCP Consul Available in Singapore and Sydney AWS Regions: HCP Vault and HCP Consul cl…
entry.content: HCP Vault and HCP Consul Available in Singapore and Sydney AWS Regions: HCP Vault and HCP Consul clusters can now be deployed in Singapore and Sydney AWS regions. Read more

entry.title: 2021-09-14: HCP Vault Admin Token Entity Policy Change: Users of HCP Vault admin tokens can now avoid unchecked…
entry.content: HCP Vault Admin Token Entity Policy Change: Users of HCP Vault admin tokens can now avoid unchecked client counts due to them not being associated with a Vault identity. This change attaches an entity to admin tokens, which results in the maximum admin-token associated client count for a cluster being 1 per month.

entry.title: 2021-08-24: Multi-Factor Authentication Configuration: Users can now disable MFA for their HCP accounts.
entry.content: Multi-Factor Authentication Configuration: Users can now disable MFA for their HCP accounts. Read more

entry.title: 2021-08-09: HCP Vault 1.8.0 (New Clusters Only): Users can now use Vault 1.8.0 for new Vault clusters.
entry.content:
HCP Vault 1.8.0 (New Clusters Only): Users can now use Vault 1.8.0 for new Vault clusters. Read more about Vault 1.8.0

HVN-HVN Peering: It is now possible to peer two HVNs across regions within AWS. The Peering can be created automatically through the HCP Consul Federation create flow or manually through the HCP Terraform Provider.

entry.title: 2021-08-04: HCP Terraform Provider 0.12.0: Version 0.12.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available.
entry.content:
HCP Terraform Provider 0.12.0: Version 0.12.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available. Read more

  • What's New:
    • HCP Vault: A new configuration is now available in the provider: starter_small

entry.title: 2021-08-02: HCP Vault Starter Configuration: Users can create a new HCP Vault configuration: The Starter config…
entry.content:
HCP Vault Starter Configuration: Users can create a new HCP Vault configuration: The Starter configuration provides a production-grade cluster that balances predictable pricing, performance, and cost. Read more

  • Specs/features:
    • 2 vCPU, 8 GiB RAM
    • 5 GB storage, 250 GB for snapshots and audit logs (soft limits)
    • 25 included clients
    • Audit logs
    • Snapshots and restores
    • Bronze tier Cloud support

entry.title: 2021-07-30: Multi-Factor Authentication: Users can now enable MFA from within their own HCP account.
entry.content:
Multi-Factor Authentication: Users can now enable MFA from within their own HCP account. Read more

HCP Consul Plus Configuration with Federation: HCP Consul Plus allows users to federate Consul clusters across multiple regions for improved redundancy and resiliency of applications. This provides a simple and secure way for users to implement a multi-region service mesh in AWS. Read more

entry.title: 2021-07-20: HCP Vault Resource Quotas: To help maintain the health of the fleet, the following resource limits…
entry.content:
HCP Vault Resource Quotas: To help maintain the health of the fleet, the following resource limits are now in place:

  • Added cgroup-based resource limits for HCP Vault clusters
  • Added Vault API resource limits (requests/second)

entry.title: 2021-07-16: HCP Terraform Provider 0.10.0: Version 0.10.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available.
entry.content:
HCP Terraform Provider 0.10.0: Version 0.10.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available. Read more

  • What's New:
    • HCP Consul: Fixed an issue with updating the version of Consul

entry.title: 2021-07-12: Organization Rename: Users can now rename their HCP organization by navigating to the Org Managemen…
entry.content: Organization Rename: Users can now rename their HCP organization by navigating to the Org Management page, or by clicking Settings on the left Navbar, then Manage, and then Edit name.

entry.title: 2021-07-06: Terraform Landing Page: the HCP Portal now includes a landing page for both TFC and the HCP Terrafo…
entry.content: Terraform Landing Page: the HCP Portal now includes a landing page for both TFC and the HCP Terraform Provider. It can be accessed on the main left-hand navigation under Consul and Vault.

entry.title: 2021-06-30: HCP Terraform Provider 0.9.0: Version 0.9.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available.
entry.content:
HCP Terraform Provider 0.9.0: Version 0.9.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available. Read more

  • What's New:
    • HCP Consul: Users can now specify if auto peering should happen with auto_hvn_to_hvn_peering
    • HCP Vault: Users can now update public_endpoint without having to recreate the cluster

entry.title: 2021-06-18: HCP Terraform Provider 0.8.0: Version 0.8.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available.
entry.content:
HCP Terraform Provider 0.8.0: Version 0.8.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available. Read more

  • What's New:
    • HCP Consul: A new configuration is now available in the provider: plus
    • HCP Vault: New configurations are now available in the provider: standard_small, standard_medium, standard_large

UI Scalable Navigation: The main headers and general approach to navigation within the portal has been significantly updated to improve usability.

entry.title: 2021-06-17: User Profile Page: The HCP Profile Page now shows your HashiCorp ID, and offers the ability to rese…
entry.content: User Profile Page: The HCP Profile Page now shows your HashiCorp ID, and offers the ability to reset your password.

entry.title: 2021-06-07: HCP Terraform Provider 0.7.0: Version 0.7.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available.
entry.content:
HCP Terraform Provider 0.7.0: Version 0.7.0 of the HCP Terraform Provider is now available. Read more

  • What's New:
    • Users can now manage HVN Routes from the provider

Note: This version contains breaking changes to the hcp_aws_transit_gateway_attachment and hcp_aws_network_peering resources and data sources. Please pin to the previous version and follow this migration guide when you're ready to migrate.

entry.title: 2021-05-17: AWS Transit Gateway Attachments: As you grow your HCP footprint, you’ll need more elegant ways to s…
entry.content:
AWS Transit Gateway Attachments: As you grow your HCP footprint, you’ll need more elegant ways to simplify networking at scale. That’s why we introduced support for transit gateway attachments in HCP. Transit gateways enable a “hub-and-spoke” configuration of your networks, a simpler and more secure option compared to the complexity of managing separate virtual private cloud (VPC) connections. Instead of establishing a VPC peering connection for every environment, you can create an “attachment” to a transit gateway. The transit gateway then manages these connections centrally. With a transit gateway, you can secure a single ingress/egress point, instead of monitoring multiple peering connections. To get started, read this tutorial and watch webinar.

HVN Routes (Web Portal Only): Users now have a single place to view/edit all of the connections associated with HVN’s. This includes the option for the user to view routes for BOTH peerings and TGW attachments. There are options to view/add/delete HVN routes through the UI. Read more

entry.title: 2021-05-03: Single Sign-On via Okta: HCP allows organizations to configure SAML 2.0 SSO (Single Sign-On) as an…
entry.content: Single Sign-On via Okta: HCP allows organizations to configure SAML 2.0 SSO (Single Sign-On) as an alternative to traditional user management with GitHub and email-based options. This can help mitigate Account Take Over (ATO) attacks, provide a universal source of truth to federate identities from your identity provider (IDP), and better manage user access to your organization. At this time, HCP integrates with Okta as an identity provider, with others planned. Read more

entry.title: 2021-04-07: New Sizing Options for HCP Consul Standard Tier: Users have additional sizing options when deployin…
entry.content:
New Sizing Options for HCP Consul Standard Tier: Users have additional sizing options when deploying a Consul Standard cluster. Medium and Large VM sizes are now available in HCP. See pricing

HCP Vault Generally Availability on AWS: HCP Vault gives you the power and security of HashiCorp Vault as a managed service. Read more

entry.title: 2021-04-06: Free Credits Expanded: New users now have $50 in credits for use on HCP.
entry.content: Free Credits Expanded: New users now have $50 in credits for use on HCP. Sign up

entry.title: 2021-03-09: Email/Password Authentication: Users can now login and authenticate using email/password, in additi…
entry.content: Email/Password Authentication: Users can now login and authenticate using email/password, in addition to GitHub. Sign up

entry.title: 2021-02-02: HCP Consul General Availability: HCP Consul is now generally available on AWS.
entry.content: HCP Consul General Availability: HCP Consul is now generally available on AWS. HCP Consul is a fully managed service mesh to discover and securely connect any service. Read more

entry.title: 2021-01-14: HCP Vault Public Beta: HashiCorp Vault is now available on HashiCorp Cloud Platform in public beta.
entry.content: HCP Vault Public Beta: HashiCorp Vault is now available on HashiCorp Cloud Platform in public beta. Read more
